_comment: TEMPORARY measurement probe for the awaiting-input feature. Merge this 'hooks' block into ~/.claude/settings.json (fix the YOU path; use python/python3 to match your system), restart Claude Code, reproduce: (a) Claude asks a question, (b) Claude presents a plan, (c) a permission prompt — then answer each. Send ~/.claude/hook_probe.log, then REMOVE this block and restart. It only writes a log; it never touches the board, and it runs alongside your existing matrix hooks (multiple hooks per event are allowed). Goal: learn whether PreToolUse fires for AskUserQuestion/ExitPlanMode, when PostToolUse fires for them, whether Stop fires while a question is pending, and whether Notification fires permission_prompt.
